$schema: Custom SQL entries that live outside Drizzle-generated migrations
instructions: When generating next migration, append the SQL from 'pending' entries to the migration file, then update status to 'applied' and set migration field.

entries.description: Deferred FK: departments.managerId → employees.id (composite with tenantId)
entries.sql: ALTER TABLE hr.departments ADD CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, manager_id) REFERENCES hr.employees(tenant_id, id);

entries.description: Deferred FK: departments.costCenterId → costCenters.id (composite with tenantId)
entries.sql: ALTER TABLE hr.departments ADD CONSTRAINT fk_departments_cost_center FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id, cost_center_id) REFERENCES hr.cost_centers(tenant_id, id);
